sql_template: SELECT AVG({metric}) AS avg_{metric} FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE region = '{region}'
SELECT AVG({metric}) AS avg_{metric} FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE region = '{region}' AND category = '{category}'
SELECT {dimension}, SUM({metric}) AS sum_{metric} FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY {dimension} ORDER BY SUM({metric}) DESC
SELECT {dimension}, AVG({metric}) AS avg_{metric} FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY {dimension} ORDER BY AVG({metric}) DESC
SELECT {dimension}, COUNT(*) AS count FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY {dimension}
SELECT {dimension}, AVG({metric}) AS avg_{metric} FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY {dimension}
SELECT {dimension}, SUM({metric}) AS sum_{metric} FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY {dimension}
